| `csrrwi` | `rd, csr, uimm5` | $rd \leftarrow csr; \ csr \leftarrow uimm5$ | *CSR read/write immediate* | I |
| `csrrsi` | `rd, csr, uimm5` | $rd \leftarrow csr; \ csr \leftarrow csr \text{ or } uimm5$ | *CSR read and set bits immediate* | I |
| `csrrci` | `rd, csr, uimm5` | $rd \leftarrow csr; \ csr \leftarrow csr \text{ and not } uimm5$ | *CSR read and clear bits immediate* | I |
